description: Use this API to add an individual OPF bus load data record to the working case. It may also be used to modify an existing bus load data record. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = opf_load_indv(eibus, loadid, intgar)

parameters.name: loadid
parameters.description: Bus load identifier. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: intgar
parameters.description: Adjustable bus load table cross reference number. (input; Default value of 0 if new record, current value otherwise, by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
